task_completion.description: A new CI pipeline named 'Tailwind-CI' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps Pipelines page shows a pipeline named 'Tailwind-CI' in the list.

task_completion.description: The pipeline is created using the 'Starter pipeline' template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pipeline creation process shows the 'Starter pipeline' option selected, or the resulting YAML file contains the default starter code (e.g., simple echo scripts).

task_completion.description: The status badge markdown for the main branch is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Status badge' dialog box is open in Azure DevOps for the 'Tailwind-CI' pipeline, showing the markdown format starting with '[![Build Status]'.

task_completion.description: The status badge is added to the top of the README.md file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The README.md file is open in an editor (web or local) and the badge markdown is pasted at the very top of the file.

task_completion.description: The updated README.md is committed to the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A commit is made saving the changes to README.md, or the repository's file view shows the rendered status badge at the top of the README.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with Azure DevOps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Azure DevOps web interface being used to create the pipeline and get the badge, rather than terminal API commands.

integrity.description: The badge markdown contains a genuine URL pointing to the local Azure DevOps server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The badge URL in the markdown includes the correct base URL (http://localhost/DefaultCollection) and project/repo paths, not a placeholder.

integrity.description: The README.md edited belongs to the TailwindTraders repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor shows the file path or repository context as TailwindTraders, ensuring a random local file wasn't edited instead.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project and repository name is 'TailwindTraders'. The pipeline must be named 'Tailwind-CI'. The status badge markdown should start with '[![Build Status]' and the URL should point to the local Azure DevOps Server instance at 'http://localhost/DefaultCollection'.
